resultList.dtldesc: Own a stylish and cozy home with this 2 BHK apartment for sale in RKs Oxygen Homes, Aero Nagar, Bachupally, Hyderabad. Part of a well-planned residential complex, this apartment provides an ideal mix of convenience, connectivity, and tranquil living.Property SpecificationsPositioned on the 9th floor of the 10-storey building, the apartment covers a super area of 1260 sq. ft. and completely equipped with brand new, elegant furniture, including a special extra door that brings the entrance both charm and safety. There are two large bedrooms in the flat, one with its own bathroom and the other with access to a shared bathroom. Both bathrooms are western and fitted with geysers for extra convenience. The dining area and living space are comfortably divided, maximizing the spacious nature and movement of the house. One balcony linked to the hall provides an impressive forest view, ideal to relax and soak in nature.The modular kitchen features a chimney and has a piped gas connection included, ideal for everyday cooking. A utility area linked to it provides functionality and additional space for domestic duties. The vitrified flooring across the apartment provides a neat and shiny appearance, and is low on maintenance. The West-facing flat is Vaastu friendly, bringing good energy and natural light. The 9th floor elevation not only offers a better view but also good ventilation and lesser noise.FacilitiesResidents have the facility of covered parking for parking their vehicles safely and conveniently. 24-hour water supply and 100 power backup facilitate uninterrupted services day and night. The complex is well-protected with a personal security guard and CCTV monitoring around the compound. With 5 to 6 lifts available in the complex, including a lift adjacent to the flat, residents have easy access to their home, making daily mobility convenient.LocalitySituated in the proximity of the Pragathi Nagar Command area, RKs Oxygen Homes in Aero Nagar, Bachupally has a good residential location with very good access to basic facilities. The area is well-developed with a fine blend of quiet living and city convenience. It is well-connected to good schools such as Orchid International School located just 5 to 6 minutes away from here, an excellent location for families. Hospitals, shopping malls, and grocery stores are all located within a radius of 1 km so that medical care and everyday needs are never far away. Public transport is readily accessible, and banks and ATM machines are easily found nearby. The nearest metro station is within a 20-minute reach, adding to connectivity within the city. Besides, a forthcoming flyover that is just 5 minutes away from here guarantees better travel time and smoother road connectivity in the coming times.

resultList.dtldesc: Brilliantly designed to provide an ultimate level of convenience, this spacious 3BHK flat strategically located in Sri Ram Nagar, Hyderabad is worth investing your time and money. Every inch of this abode is efficiently and generously designed to give you more comfort.::::::Property Specifications::::::With a carpet area of 1400 sqft, this flat is comfortably positioned on the 3rd floor of a 5-storeyed building and is abundantly blessed with fresh air and sunlight, therefore you need not depend on artificial lights during the daytime. For the well-being of the residents, this west-facing flat is designed by following all the Vaastu guidelines for the happiness of the residents.::::::Now talking about the layout, this flat comprises a living cum dining room, 3 bedrooms, a modular kitchen with a chimney, 3 bathrooms and 2 balconies. Furthermore, this property comes furnished (complete furniture is available).::::::Fashioned in western style, two bathrooms are attached to the bedrooms while the remaining one is for common use by guests/family members. Additionally, branded geysers are installed in these bathrooms for hot water supply.::::::Offering a view of the other apartments & garden, one balcony is linked with the hall while one is connected to the kitchen (utility area). Moreover, the flooring is covered with vitrified tiles which are known for their high quality and durability.::::::Facilities::::::For the convenience of the residents, major facilities such as covered parking (stilt), 24 hours water supply, 1 lift and 100% power backup are provided in this apartment. Also, a security guard is appointed to keep a close watch and CCTV cameras are installed for 24x7 surveillance.::::::Locality::::::This property is situated near Botanical Garden, MB Mall and IT Companies & financial district (at 2 to 3 km), which are also prime landmarks. A number of top-rated schools and reputed hospitals are located within a short distance. For all your shopping/grocery needs, famous malls/supermarkets are present at a range of 2 to 3 km. Also, several private/nationalized banks and ATM centers can be found within the vicinity.::::::The railway station and the metro station are accessible within 5 to 7 km whereas several means of public transportation such as buses, autos and taxis are immediately available, hence commuting to/from this locality is quite easy and convenient.

This beautifully designed ground floor unit spans a generous 2900 sqft. of carpet area and forms part of a 2 floor structure. The house features 5 well ventilated bedrooms, 4 bathrooms, and 3 balconies, making it ideal for a large family. The property is east facing and offers a pleasant main road view, providing ample natural light and an open feel. The asking price is 1.6 crore.Property SpecificationsThe home showcases a blend of vitrified and marble flooring, giving it a refined, durable finish. The layout is thoughtfully planned, including a servant room to support larger household needs. The unit includes one covered and one open parking space, ensuring secure and convenient vehicle storage. Being a ground floor unit, it provides easy accessibility and direct entry, making it comfortable for senior citizens or families with children.FacilitiesThis residence offers 24-hour water supply and benefits from no or rare power cuts, ensuring a comfortable and uninterrupted lifestyle. The house is part of a well developed locality with all essential infrastructure already in place. The space is ideal for families looking for a blend of comfort, functionality, and long-term value in a peaceful yet well-connected area.LocalityLocated in Balapur, this property enjoys a strategic position with Indian Oil Petrol Pump and Edamma Temple as nearby landmarks. The area is well connected to major roads, public transportation, schools, shops, and daily conveniences. The main road-facing position ensures visibility and ease of access, making this an excellent choice for end-users or even rental investors seeking value and location advantage.
